statement: In every magma, Equation 1182 (`x = y * ((z * (z * x)) * z)`) implies Equation 4431 (`x * (x * y) = (z * w) * u`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0392
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op y (op (op z (op z x)) z))) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, (op x (op x y)) = (op (op z w) u)
